heading: Establishment of Cheyenne Bottoms Migratory Bird Refuge; purpose
label: 691a Establishment of Cheyenne Bottoms Migratory Bird Refuge; purpose
text: Such lands, when acquired in accordance with the provisions of , shall constitute the Cheyenne Bottoms Migratory Bird Refuge, and shall be maintained as a refuge and breeding place for migratory birds included in the terms of the convention between the United States and Great Britain for the protection of migratory birds concluded .section 691 of this titleAugust 16, 1916
